name: Shenzhen Hymson Laser Intelligent Equipments Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Hymson Laser Intelligent Equipments Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells lasers and automation equipment in China and internationally. Its products include lithium battery automation, wind-cooled UV laser equipment, large scale automated production line, large scale laser cutting equipment, sapphire cutting equipment, and PCB labeling systems, as well as precision laser cutting and welding equipment. The company serves 3C, medical, electricity, and semiconductor industries. Shenzhen Hymson Laser Intelligent Equipments Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
